about.title: Redefining Restaurant Reservations in Georgia
about.subtitle: Born in Tbilisi, Tablo bridges the gap between exceptional restaurants and the guests who love them — through technology that feels invisible.
about.storyTitle: From a simple idea to Georgia's dining platform
about.storyP1: Tablo was born from a familiar frustration: trying to book a table at a popular Tbilisi restaurant. Phone calls went unanswered, social media DMs got lost, and walk-ins were always a gamble.
about.storyP2: We built Tablo to solve this — a seamless platform where diners can discover, select their exact table, and get instant confirmation. For restaurant owners, we provide powerful tools to manage reservations, optimize seating, and grow their business.
about.value1Desc: Every interaction should feel effortless — from browsing to booking to dining.
about.value2Desc: We build tools that genuinely make restaurant owners' lives easier and businesses stronger.
about.value3Desc: Deep understanding of Georgian hospitality, culture, and dining traditions drives our design.
about.value4Desc: Interactive floor plans, real-time availability, and smart CRM — we push boundaries.
about.featuresTitle: Everything you need to dine and manage
about.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're a diner looking for the perfect table or a restaurant owner ready to modernize your bookings, we're here for you.

contact.title: Let's Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a restaurant owner interested in partnering with us, or a diner with feedback — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSuccess: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Thank you for choosing Tablo. The protection and privacy of your personal information is our top priority. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data when using our platform.
privacy.section1Content: We collect personal data you provide when registering or making a booking: name, surname, phone number, email, and special requests (e.g. dietary restrictions). We also automatically collect technical information about your device, IP address, and behavior on the platform.
privacy.section2Content: Your information is used only to provide the service: to process bookings, communicate with the restaurant, send booking confirmations or reminders (SMS/Email), and improve our services. Your preferences help us offer a simple and personalized service.
privacy.section3Content: We share your basic data only with the specific restaurant you book, so they can properly accommodate you. We absolutely do not sell or rent your personal information to other companies for marketing purposes. Data sharing in other cases occurs only when required by law.
privacy.section4Content: We use modern security standards and encryption to protect your data. Information is stored on secure servers with access restricted to authorized personnel. Data is kept only as long as necessary to provide the service or meet legal requirements.
privacy.section5Content: You have the full right to request to view, edit, or delete your personal data from our system. You can do this through your profile settings or by emailing us at privacy@tablo.ge. We respect your decisions.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms and conditions govern the use of the Tablo platform. Using our service automatically means you fully agree to these terms.
terms.section1Content: Tablo is a digital platform connecting users with partner restaurants for table reservations. We are not directly restaurant or food service providers; we only provide the technical booking system and information transfer.
terms.section2Content: You are obligated to provide real and accurate information when creating an account or booking. You are responsible for all actions taken from your account. Misuse of the platform, making fake bookings (no-shows), or hindering system operations is prohibited.
terms.section3Content: When booking through Tablo, you enter a direct agreement with the restaurant. The restaurant is fully responsible for its service quality, dishes, hygiene standards, and respecting booking conditions. Any claims arising at the restaurant are the responsibility of the restaurant itself.
terms.section4Content: Please respect the restaurant's time. If you cannot attend, you must cancel the booking in advance from your profile. Frequent 'no-shows' (booking and not appearing) may cause the system to automatically restrict your right to make bookings.
terms.section5Content: All logos, designs, text, and software on the Tablo platform represent our intellectual property and are protected by law. Unauthorized use or copying is prohibited.
terms.section6Content: Tablo provides the platform 'as is' and is not responsible for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from the use of the service or the restaurant experience booked through our platform.
terms.section7Title: Service Fees and Packages (For Restaurants Only)
terms.section7Content: Tablo offers various service packages to partner restaurants: 1) A commission model where the restaurant pays 2 GEL per guest brought in by the Tablo platform; 2) A fixed monthly subscription package; 3) A premium restaurant package where the guest pays a reservation fee or deposit (if requested in advance by the restaurant). Detailed terms are defined in the individual contract signed with the restaurant.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: This policy applies to those rare cases where advance payment, requested deposit, or subscription service (for restaurants) is processed through the Tablo platform.
refund.section1Title: For Guests - Deposits and Advance Payments (B2C)
refund.section1Content: Currently, Tablo does not process direct transactions from guests to purchase food. However, if a specific restaurant requires a reservation deposit through our system: The amount will be fully refunded if you cancel the booking before the free cancellation deadline set by the restaurant. In case of late cancellation or no-show, the deposit is non-refundable and will be transferred to the restaurant. Refunds are processed to the original card within 3-5 business days.
refund.section2Content: For paid packages and subscriptions intended for restaurants: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, the service will remain active until the end of the current paid period. The subscription fee for an already paid month or year is non-refundable, except in rare cases where the service was completely unavailable due to technical reasons for an extended period.
refund.section3Content: If you believe you were charged in error, please contact us at billing@tablo.ge within 48 hours of receiving the notification. Our team will investigate your request in detail alongside the specific restaurant.
